verses.text: Nipi ni zingsang tungin numeite in a bawlsa uh paknamtui tawi-in hanah va pai uh hi
Han phual a tun' uh ciangin hankhuk hukna suang a kilikkhia mu uh ahih manin
a sungah tumpah uh a, ahi zongin Topa Jesuh' luang na omlo hi
Amaute in lamdangsa-in a om laitakun amaute gei-ah puanpak a silh mi nih hong dingvat uh hi
Numeite lau mahmah uh ahih manin lei lam nga-in kuncip uh hi. Tua mi nihte in, “Bang hangin misite lakah mihing zong na hi uh hiam
Hih lai-ah om nawnlo hi; kithosak zo hi. Galilee gamah a om lai-in note kiangah thu hong genin
‘Mawhnei mite' khutsungah Mihing Tapa kipia ding a, singlamteh tungah kithatin, a ni thum ni-in hingkik ding hi,’ a cih thute phawk un,” a ci uh hi
Tua ciangin amaute in Jesuh' thugente phawkkik uh a
han panin ciahkikin, nungzui sawmlekhatte leh midangte kiangah hih thute a gen uh hi
Sawltakte kiangah hih thu a gen numeite pen Magdala khuami Mary, Joanna, James' nu Mary, leh numei dangte ahi uh hi
Ahi zongin hih numeite' thugen pen thu phuahtawm bangin ngaihsun uh a, umlo uh hi
Ahi zongin Peter dingin hanah va tai a, han sung a etsuk ciangin a kitunna puan bek na om hi. Tua ciangin amah in zong tua thupiang lamdangsa-in inn-ah a ciahkik hi.
Tua ni mahin, Jesuh' thu a zui mi nih, Jerusalem khua panin tai sagih bang a gamla Emmaus kici khua-ah a pai uh hi
A paikawmun hih thupiangte kikumkum uh hi
Tua bangin kiho-in thu kikumin a om laitakun Jesuh mahmah in hong naihin amaute tawh hong tonkhawm hi
Amaute gel in a muh hangun Jesuh ahihlam theilo uh hi
Jesuh in, “Na lam paikawmun bang gengen na hi uh hiam?” ci-in a dong hi. Amaute gel zong din'khawl pah uh a, a maisuah uh dahmai mahmah lai hi
Tua ciangin amaute gel sung panin Kleopas a kicipa in, “Jerusalem-a hawhte lakah tusawng tenga tua lai-a thupiang a theilo nang bek na hi ding hi,” ci-in a dawng hi

Tua ciangin Jesuh in amaute kiangah, “Bang thu ahi hiam?” ci-in a dot ciangin amaute in, “Nazareth khuami Jesuh tunga thupiang ahi hi. Amah pen kamsang khat hi a, Pasian leh mite khempeuh in a thugen leh a nasepna-ah vang a nei mahmah khatin a ngaihsut uh ahi hi
Ahi zongin ka siampi liante uh leh ka uliante un sihna thukhenna a thuak dingin Pilat tungah ap uh a, singlamteh tungah kithat hi
Amah pen Israel mite a honkhia dingpa hi, ci-in ka lamet uh ahi hi. Tua bang hinapi-in hih thuteng hong piang a, tu-in a thu pian'zawh a ni thumna hita hi
Ko pawlte' sung panin numei pawlkhat in lamdang ka sak uh thu hong gen uh hi. Amaute, tu zingsang tungin hanah va pai uh a
ahi zongin ama luang na om nawnlo hi. Tua ciangin amaute hong ciahkik uh a, vantung mite a muhna uh leh tua vantung mite in Jesuh a hin'kik khitna thu a gennate uh hong gensawn uh hi
Tua ciangin ka lawmte uh pawlkhat zong hanah va pai uh a, numeite' gen bang teekteekin va mu uh a, ahi zongin Jesuh mulo uh hi,” ci-in a dawng hi
Tua ciangin Jesuh in amaute gel kiangah, “Bangzah takin hai a, bang dingin kamsangte' thugen um theilo na hi uh hiam
Khrih in minthan'na a ngahna dingin hih bangteng a thuakding kisam hilo ahi hiam?” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Jesuh in Lai Siangtho sungah ama thu a kigennate khempeuh, Moses laibu-a kipanin kamsangte' laibu khempeuh a khiatna a gen hi
Tua khua a tun' uh ciangin Jesuh a paisuak ding bangin hong om a
ahi zongin amaute gel in kho-in, “Tu-in nitak lam hita a, ni tum dektak ahih manin ko tawh hong tamkhawm in,” a ci uh hi. Tua ahih manin Jesuh zong amaute tawh a tam hi
Amaute tawh anne dingin a tut ciangin Jesuh in anlum la a, Pasian tungah lungdamna a kohkhit ciangin balnenin amaute a pia hi
Tua laitakin a haktawm bangin Jesuh ahih lamtak mu-in thei uh a, ahi zongin amau' muhna panin Jesuh a mangpah hi
Amaute gel in, “Lampi-ah i paikawmin Lai Siangtho khiatna hong gen laitakin i lungsim hong lawpsak mahmah hi mah lo ahi hiam?” a kici uh hi
Amau zong thakhatin dingpahin Jerusalem-ah paikik uh a, nungzui sawmlekhatte leh adangte na kikhawmin
“Topa hingkik khin takpi hi. Simon kiangah na kilak khinzo hi,” ci-in a kigengen laitak uh a tuak uh hi
Tua ciangin tua mi nihte in zong a lam pai laitak uha thupiang teng, leh anlum a balnen ciangin Topa ahih lamtak a theihnate uh a gen uh hi.
Amaute hih thu kikumin a om laitakun thakhat thu-in Jesuh mahmah amaute lakah hong ding a, “Nopna ngah ta un,” ci-in amaute a hopih hi
Ahi zongin amaute lau-in linglawng gawp uh a, sikha a mu hi ni, ci-in a ngaihsun uh hi
Tua ciangin Jesuh in amaute kiangah, “Bang hangin lungmang a, bang hangin lungka na hi uh hiam
Ka khut leh ka khete en un; keimahmah ka hi hi. Hong lawng un la hong thei un. Tu-a keima neih bangin sikha in pum leh tak nei ahi hiam?” a cih khit ciangin
a khut leh a khete a lak hi
Amaute nuamlua kisa-in lamdangsa-in um zolo phialin a om laitakun, “Nektheih khat peuhpeuh na nei uh hiam?” ci-in a dot ciangin
amaute in zong ngasa haan'keu khat pia uh a
Jesuh in saangin amaute' muhin a ne hi

Tua ciangin Jesuh in amaute kiangah, “Tu-a thupiang khempeuh pen note tawh kong omkhawm lai-a ka gengen thute mah ahi hi. Moses Thukham laibu sung, kamsangte laibu sung, leh Late sungah a kigelh thu khempeuh a tung ding ahi hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Lai Siangtho sung thu a theihna dingun a lungsim uh hon'sak a
amaute kiangah, “Khrih in sihna thuakin, a ni thum ni-in sihna panin hingkik ding a
Jerusalem khua-a kipan minam khempeuh tungah a mawhna uh kisikin a kimaisakna ding thu, ama min tawh kihilh ding hi, ci-in kigelh hi
Note pen hih thu khempeuh a thei teci na hi uh hi
Ka Pa' hong ciamsa thu, note tungah ka hong pia ding hi. Ahi zongin vantung panin tua vangliatna na ngah mateng uh hih Jerusalem khuapi-ah na ngak un,” a ci hi.
Tua ciangin Jerusalem khuasung panin Bethany khuagei ciang amaute paipih a, tua lai panin a khut laamto-in amaute thupha a pia hi
Amaute thupha a piak laitakin amaute kiang panin paikhia-in vantungah amah a kilato hi
Amaute in amah bia uh a, lungdam mahmahin Jerusalem khua-ah a ciahkik uh hi
Tua ciangin Pasian tungah lungdamna a ko dingin biakinn-ah a pai tawntung uh hi.
